feat.name: Specialized Mount
feat.special: You can select this feat up to three times. Each time, add a different specialization to your mount. Your mount can’t have more than three specializations.
feat.text: You’ve trained your mount to perform in unusual or even extreme circumstances, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind. Your mount gains one specialization of your choice.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
